jobs.title: Sr. Product Marketing Manager - Event Content
jobs.description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.

Snowflake is about empowering enterprises to achieve their full potential — and people too. With a culture that's all in on impact, innovation, and collaboration, Snowflake is the sweet spot for building big, moving fast, and taking technology — and careers — to the next level.

Snowflake is growing fast and we're scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We're passionate about our people, our customers, our values and our culture! We're also looking for people with a growth mindset and the pragmatic insight to solve for today while building for the future. And as a Snowflake employee, you will be accountable for supporting and enabling diversity and belonging.

At Snowflake, the Sr. Product Marketing Manager - Event Content is an integral member of the AI Data Cloud product marketing team responsible for driving the operational engine behind our event content. This person manages the end-to-end content production pipeline across our flagship events — such as Snowflake Summit, Snowflake World Tour, and Data for Breakfast — and the downstream programs that extend from them, including digital event extensions and field programs.

This highly organized and detail-oriented candidate ensures that sessions, speakers, and assets move from concept to delivery flawlessly and on schedule. This role works closely with internal stakeholders across product marketing, strategic events, field marketing, sales, and external agencies, serving as the primary point of contact for content workstreams across both physical and digital programs.

Location: Hybrid — Menlo Park or Dublin

WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Manage the end-to-end content production pipeline for strategic events — leveraging automation and AI-powered tools to track sessions, speakers, and assets from submission through delivery and post-event distribution

Act as the primary point of contact for internal and external speakers — managing submission deadlines, review cycles, rehearsal coordination, and asset approvals across concurrent programs

Ensure speaker portals, event content catalogs, and website content is accurate and current across all platforms

Coordinate cross-functional content reviews with internal stakeholders (Product Marketing, Legal, Corporate Marketing) and external agencies to ensure all assets are approved and show-ready

Lead the packaging and distribution of event content into reusable formats for account-level activations, webinars, and digital follow-ons — using AI to scale and personalize content repurposing across audiences and channels

Partner with agency and AV production teams to ensure content assets meet technical specifications and brand requirements

OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE:

2–5+ years of experience in event operations, content operations, or marketing program execution in a B2B environment

Proven ability to manage multiple concurrent workstreams and stakeholders under tight deadlines

Experience with automating workflows with AI, project management tools, and content or event management platforms

Strong written and verbal communication skills with a customer service orientation and solution-focused approach

Execution excellence with great attention to detail as well as effective written and verbal communication

Experience in-house at a large, highly visible technology company or event marketing agency

Familiarity with Speaker Resource Center tooling, event CMS platforms (e.g., RainFocus, Cvent), or similar systems

Proven success in executing multiple events and programs simultaneously using both internal and external resources

Motivated self-starter with a bias for action who thrives in complex, fast-moving environments

Data-driven approach to evaluating the effectiveness of events and identifying opportunities for improvement

AI-driven mindset when implementing workflows and processes

jobs.title: Staff Creative Content Lead, XR
jobs.description:
Applicants in San Francisco: Qualified applications with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers and the California Fair Chance Act.
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: San Jose, CA, USA; San Francisco, CA, USA; New York, NY, USA.
Minimum qualifications:
Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
8 years of related experience including consumer-facing product design.
Include a portfolio, website, or any other relevant link to your work in your resume (providing a viewable link or access instructions).

Preferred qualifications:
Experience partnering closely with cross-functional teams.
Experience developing content design strategy for new or complex product spaces.
Experience with XR/AR/VR.
Project management and cross-functional collaboration skills.
About the job

The UX team works on technologies to enable the next generation of XR experiences and devices. We design, prototype, and research the experiences and interactions that set the direction for Google's emerging products across the spectrum of XR devices.

In a nascent and quickly developing category of devices with new user interaction paradigms, the role of Creative Content Lead is critical in shaping creative direction, users’ emerging mental models, and adoption of our products. In this role, you will lead content design strategy across the portfolio of XR devices and experiences, including immersive headsets and glasses with and without displays.

For decades, the computing revolution has reshaped our world driven by
breakthroughs in compute, connectivity, mobile, and now, AI. Google's XR team is at the forefront of the next major leap – the convergence of AI and XR. This is more than just new devices – it's about reimagining how we interact with the world around us. We're building a future where lightweight XR devices like smart glasses and headsets pair with helpful AI to augment human intelligence, offering personalized, conversational, and contextually aware experiences.

The US base salary range for this full-time position is $189,000-$274,000 + bonus + equity + benefits. Our salary ranges are determined by role, level, and location. Within the range, individual pay is determined by work location and additional factors, including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process.

Please note that the compensation details listed in US role postings reflect the base salary only, and do not include bonus, equity, or benefits. Learn more about benefits at Google.

Responsibilities
Lead creative content design and UX Writing across the portfolio of XR devices and experiences.
Develop content design strategy for the full spectrum of XR devices and experiences. Develop deep understanding of user needs and product behaviors and constraints.
Partner with UX and cross-functional teams to implement content design, delivering polished, high quality UX writing across the ecosystem.
Partner with cross-product areas to create content design for first-party app experiences to bring a consistent voice and approach across the ecosystem.
Create XR UX guidelines for voice, tone, and style, and elevate Content Design and UX writing craft. Develop and manage content design and UX writer process and workflows, including string management and translations. Support development of narrative for key XR public moments and launches.

jobs.title: Content Automation and GenAI - Consulting and Delivery Manager
jobs.description:
We are:

Accenture Song accelerates growth and value for our clients through sustained customer relevance. Our capabilities span ideation to execution: growth, product and experience design; technology and experience platforms; creative, media and marketing strategy; and campaign, content and channel orchestration. With strong client relationships and deep industry expertise, we help our clients operate at the speed of life through the unlimited potential of imagination, technology and intelligence. Visit us at: www.accenture.com/song

The Content Practice, inside the Marketing pillar of Song, is where we partner with clients to help them capture, create, produce, and localize content as efficiently and effectively as possible. We partner with clients across industries, and we are able to bring capabilities that span consulting and transformations services (op model and technology road mapping and stand up), to film/video/photo capture/post production, and scaled globally delivered, tech powered, managed services around content capture, creation and production.

About the Role

We are seeking a dynamic and forward‑thinking Manager, Generative AI & Content Transformation to join our Content workstream. This leader will play a key role in shaping how our clients leverage AI to modernize content operations, improve content workflows, and adopt next‑generation marketing and content technologies.

The ideal candidate brings a blend of Generative AI fluency, Consulting experience, Client Delivery expertise, and a strong understanding of Content Operations at scale.

This is not an AI engineering role; rather, it's a role for someone who can translate AI capabilities into business‑ready solutions, guide teams, and confidently engage with clients.

As a manager, you will be a critical strategic advisor that is responsible for leading parts of the development of - and playing a hands on role in delivering - highly strategic, innovative and tailored client solutions

Key Responsibilities

Content Automation and GenAI – Consulting and Delivery

Have a conceptual understanding of GenAI tools and automation within the content ecosystem of technologies

Evaluate and differentiate between major platforms and tools (e.g., OpenAI, Google Gemini, M365 Copilot, Writer, FireFly, ChatGPT, Adobe Workfront, AEM, etc).

Quickly research and assess emerging AI tools and propose the right solution based on client needs, use cases, data considerations, and constraints.

Translate AI and GenAI concepts into clear, client‑friendly language; educate stakeholders on what’s possible, what’s practical, and what’s required.

Lead and support delivery of GenAI proof of concepts (POCs), prototypes, and pilot programs.

Stay ahead of fast‑moving trends in AI, content technologies, and next‑gen marketing, ensuring the team and clients benefit from emerging innovations.

Content Transformation

Understand and assess client content ecosystems, including content creation, workflows, governance, CMS/DAM systems, metadata, content taxonomies, and content operations at scale.

Partner with content strategy, technology, and operations teams to reimagine content processes using automation, AI, and modern content tooling.

Evaluate content technology applications and help clients build modernization roadmaps in partnership with various Accenture capability groups.

Support design of scalable content workflows and operating models enabled by major pla AI.

Delivery & Team Leadership

Lead cross-functional teams across strategy, design, content, and scaled delivery operations to deliver high‑quality client work.

Manage and mentor junior team members; foster a culture of curiosity, experimentation, and learning.

Conceptually understand modern product development methodologies (Agile, rapid prototyping, iterative delivery) to structure work and drive outcomes.

Client Engagement & Business Development

Act as a trusted advisor to clients, confidently communicating GenAI concepts, opportunities, risks, and solution options.

Support business development efforts including RFP responses, proposal creation, solutioning, and case studies.

Identify new opportunities to apply GenAI and content transformation solutions within existing and new accounts.

Contribute to thought leadership, client workshops, and strategic planning discussions.

Basic Qualifications:

7+ years of client‑facing consulting or digital transformation experience. Experience must include:
Hands‑on experience researching, evaluating, and applying content automation or AI tools in real-world business contexts.
Experience delivering GenAI prototypes or POCs, even if not as a technical builder.
Strong understanding of AI and GenAI fundamentals, including LLM concepts, prompt engineering basics, model capabilities/limitations, safety, and responsible AI considerations.
Familiarity with content transformation, content creation workflows, content supply chains, and/or content operations.
Strong communication skills with the ability to translate technical concepts for non‑technical audiences.
Natural curiosity, continuous learner mindset, and excitement about emerging technologies and next‑generation content/marketing practices.
Experience managing teams and/or leading delivery workstreams across many capabilities and geographies

Preferred (Nice to Have)

Experience with enterprise content systems (CMS, DAM, PIM, content automation platforms).

Exposure to content metadata design, content modeling, or structured content.

Excellent oral and written communicator, with great interpersonal skills; able to forge trusting relationships within a diverse team

What Success Looks Like

You can confidently discuss GenAI solutions with clients — not as a deep engineer, but as a solution‑oriented expert.

You know how to evaluate emerging AI tools and recommend the right one for a specific business context.

You bring structure, clarity, and strategic thinking to ambiguous client problems.

You build strong relationships across teams and help scale content transformation solutions.

You can lead client delivery work

jobs.title: Content Manager, Digital Experience
jobs.description:
What to Expect

We are looking for a talented, passionate Content Manager to join our growing Digital Content team based in Fremont. The successful candidate will be responsible for collaborating with multiple stakeholders to write, optimize, publish and manage high-quality content across our global website, ensuring that visitors to our site have a seamless and positive user experience.

Write and edit content to ensure online content supports search engine optimization (SEO) goals, our brand standards, web style guidelines and legal and compliance requirements

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager - Tech, Content Orchestration, Fire TV Experience
jobs.description:
DESCRIPTION

Fire TV is transforming how millions of customers discover and engage with entertainment content every day. We're bringing TV into the AI era — making personalization the heartbeat of how customers experience their living room, and ensuring every surface they touch feels built for them.

We are seeking a Senior Product Manager - Tech to lead Broad Personalization and Re-engagement on Fire TV. In this role, you will own the strategy and customer experience for how Fire TV organizes and ranks content across the home screen and beyond — the systems that decide what customers see first, what they return to, and what they never have to search for again. You will drive the vision for content orchestration, re-engagement and broad personalization features.

This role requires expertise in personalization and recommendation systems, a strong instinct for customer experience across large catalogs, and a proven track record of shipping ranking and re-engagement products at global scale. You will partner with data science, engineering, design, Prime Video, Alexa, advertising, and content partners to define what "personal" means on Fire TV — and to carry that standard across every surface in the organization.

Key job responsibilities
- Own the long-term product vision and strategy for organic page content ranking across Fire TV surfaces.
- Hold the bar for content row ranking across the org — establish best practices, lead cross-team reviews, and ensure new surfaces meet a consistent quality standard before they ship.
- Partner with BI on measurement frameworks for content surface performance, ensuring we have the right signals to evaluate ranking quality and customer impact.
- Lead the strategy for the re-engagement features and the technical system that collects watch history and other signals from partners.
- Ensure broad personalization features scale globally with appropriate localization, closing the gap between US and international customer experiences.
- Translate complex strategies into clear product requirements, user stories, and technical specifications.
- Manage prioritization and trade-offs among customer experience, technical complexity, performance, and business impact.
- Own key metrics including re-engagement, content discovery success rates, and customer satisfaction.
- Stay at the forefront of AI/ML advancements in ranking, recommendation systems, and content intelligence.

BASIC QUALIFICATIONS

- 5+ years of product or program management, product marketing, business development or technology experience
- Bachelor's degree
- Experience with feature delivery and tradeoffs of a product
- Experience owning/driving roadmap strategy and definition
- Experience with end to end product delivery
- Experience contributing to engineering discussions around technology decisions and strategy related to a product
- Experience managing technical products or online services
- Experience in representing and advocating for a variety of critical customers and stakeholders during executive-level prioritization and planning

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

- Experience in using analytical tools, such as Tableau, Qlikview, QuickSight
- Experience in building and driving adoption of new tools

Responsibilities

About the Team
The Safety Product (or Platform Responsibility)team is at the forefront of building and optimizing content safety systems. With a focus on optimising and advancing content safety, we leverage advanced large language models to enhance review efficiency, risk control, and user trust. Working closely with business and technical stakeholders, we deliver scalable solutions that keep pace with rapid global growth.

Responsibilities:
- Define, own, and evolve success metrics that reflect end-user goals and platform integrity outcomes, using data to guide prioritization and product decisions.
- Own ideation, prioritization, and end-to-end execution for your product area within TikTok Integrity & Authenticity, spanning design, development, testing, launch, and post-launch iteration.
- Lead complex, cross-functional initiatives by building alignment and influence across global teams, including Engineering, Data Science, Policy, Operations, and Design.
- Leverage AI-driven detection models and ML-powered moderation systems—with a foundational understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)—to reduce misinformation, minimize both leakage and over-enforcement, and strengthen user trust.
- Design and scale agentic workflows that retrieve supporting evidence, assess factual claims, and drive detection, moderation, and removal of misleading content, combining model reasoning, policy logic, and human review where appropriate.
- Identify emerging risks and strategic opportunities across misinformation and integrity domains, translating external signals and internal insights into actionable, measurable product solutions.

Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications
- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
- 3+ years of experience as a Product Manager (or a strong demonstrated ability to rapidly develop PM expertise through ownership, execution, and impact).
- Strong logical reasoning and critical thinking skills, with the ability to break down ambiguous problems into structured solutions.
- Evidence-based and data-driven mindset; comfortable using metrics, experimentation, and analysis to identify problems, uncover opportunities, and drive continuous improvement.
- Clear communicator who can articulate product vision, execution trade-offs, and delivery challenges, and lead deep cross-team collaboration to solve complex problems.

Preferred Qualifications
- Proven experience or working knowledge of Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning systems, particularly applied to real-world products.
- Experience in Trust & Safety, Content Moderation, Integrity, or related domains.
- Familiarity with policy-driven systems and human-in-the-loop workflows is a plus.

Responsibilities

About the team:
Global e-commerce is a content e-commerce business with international short video product as the carrier. It is committed to becoming the first choice for users to discover and purchase good products with affordable prices. Global e-commerce business team hopes to provide users with more tailored and efficient consumption experience, enabling merchants to receive reliable platform services in different scenarios such as live e-commerce, short video content e-commerce, so as to make more affordable and high-quality products sell easily and a better life within reach.

Content E-commerce is a global team responsible for building up the content ecosystem for E-commerce. We provide more highly qualified E-commerce content to customers to help them find good products at affordable prices. We attract more creators to land on the E-commerce platform, create more E-commerce related content and get benefits from their content. Also, we help merchants to find suitable creators to sell their products. Our mission is to build up an ecosystem which both customers and creators and merchants will benefit from.

Responsibilities:
- Lead the transformation toward AI-native engineering practices (“vibe coding”), redefining the development paradigm through deep integration of AI across the full software lifecycle. Drive a shift from traditional implementation-heavy workflows to intent-driven, AI-assisted development, including AI pair programming, intelligent test generation, automated code review, system diagnostics, and engineering knowledge copilots, fundamentally elevating R&D productivity and software quality.
- Refine and optimize the core architecture of the Content E-commerce platform, ensuring a system that is highly available, scalable, and maintainable. Aim for the stability, security, and global adaptability of the platform.
- Oversee project priorities, ensuring quality architectural deliverables. Drive technical initiatives from inception to full-scale deployment.
- Strategically develop and maintain a comprehensive technical plan that anticipates future challenges, ensuring the platform remains at the forefront of the industry. Drive breakthroughs in business results through forward-thinking technical planning.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams such Infra, SRE, and QA to align and amplify the architectural vision and engineering roadmap.
- Engage in and lead the research and application of new technologies relevant to the content e-commerce business.
- Lead and mentor the engineering team by overseeing the hiring processes, nurturing career progression, and providing ongoing training and mentorship.

Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications:
- 2+ years tech-leading a software engineering team.
- 5+ years of large scale backend system development experience.

jobs.title: Director, Content Operations
jobs.description:
The opportunity

Adobe is seeking a Director of Content Operations to shape how ideas become exceptional content across our global marketing organization. This leader will build and run the operational model that powers how creative work enters, moves through, and scales across Adobe’s Global Marketing content supply chain.

This role drives the processes and planning that align marketing demand with production capacity across the organization, including intake, prioritization, capacity planning, and workflow management. In partnership with in-house creative teams and agency partners, the Director ensures work is delivered predictably, efficiently, and at scale.

What you’ll do
Lead the operational model that governs how work moves through the content production pipeline.
Establish intake and prioritization governance that translates marketing demand into clear, prioritized production work.
Forecast demand and align work with available capacity across internal creative teams and AOR partners.
Define workflows, service levels, and operating guidelines that accelerate production across campaigns, channels, and formats.
Establish operational governance and review cadences to track capacity, SLA performance, agency efficiency, and delivery outcomes.
Oversee agency operating models, including workflow integration, engagement standards, and performance expectations.
Lead agency contract renewals working closely with Procurement and executive partners, evaluating performance and guiding renewal or partner selection decisions.
Partner with Content Technology, Standards & Enablement, Content Intelligence, and Strategic Operations to align workflows with platforms, enablement programs, and insights.
Define operational metrics with the Content Intelligence team to identify friction points and improve efficiency across the content supply chain.

Success criteria
10+ years of experience in marketing operations, creative operations, production operations, or content supply chain roles.
Demonstrated success designing scalable workflows supporting complex marketing or creative environments involving internal teams and agencies.
Experience managing agency partnerships or vendor ecosystems.
Strong systems-thinking mindset with the ability to translate complexity into clear operational frameworks.
Proven ability to align cross-functional partners across creative, marketing, agency, and technology teams.
Experience leading teams responsible for defining and enforcing operational processes, prioritization of resources, or production coordination.
Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills in highly matrixed organizations.

About Adobe
Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.

Our 30,000+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.

Let’s Adobe together
At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture , focus on people, purpose and community , Adobe for All , comprehensive benefits programs , the stories we tell , the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.

Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.

Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call +1 408-536-3015.

AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:
Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.

At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience .

Expected Pay Range: Our compensation reflects the cost of labor across several U.S. geographic markets, and we pay differently based on those defined markets. The U.S. pay range for this position is $153,200 -- $299,700 annually. Pay within this range varies by work location and may also depend on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for the job location during the hiring process.

In California, the pay range for this position is $207,000 - $299,700

At Adobe, for sales roles starting salaries are expressed as total target compensation (TTC = base + commission), and short-term incentives are in the form of sales commission plans. Non-sales roles starting salaries are expressed as base salary and short-term incentives are in the form of the Annual Incentive Plan (AIP).

In addition, certain roles may be eligible for long-term incentives in the form of a new hire equity award.

State-Specific Notices:

California :
Fair Chance Ordinances
Adobe will consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records for employment in accordance with state and local laws and “fair chance” ordinances.

Colorado:
Application Window Notice

If this role is open to hiring in Colorado (as listed on the job posting), the application window will remain open until at least the date and time stated above in Pacific Time, in compliance with Colorado pay transparency regulations. If this role does not have Colorado listed as a hiring location, no specific application window applies, and the posting may close at any time based on hiring needs.

Massachusetts:
Massachusetts Legal Notice
It is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.

Job Code
:

Responsibilities

About team:
The PGC (Professionally Generated Content) team at TikTok is dedicated to driving the growth and evolution of a professional, high-quality content ecosystem. We are dedicated to creating a global platform that fosters knowledge/education ecosystem, learner engagement, and a vibrant educational community. Our goal is to be the primary destination for knowledge seekers worldwide. We categorize our content into various tracks such as Business & Finance, Humanities, and Technology, all focused on delivering high-quality educational content.

This role is responsible for driving awareness and onboarding intent among off-platform creators toward TikTok, by partnering with Marketing, Product, and Operations to build creator trust, amplify creator voices, and establish a strong advocacy ecosystem.

- Identify showcase creators with strong influence and segment them based on content vertical, impact, and cross-platform presence
- Partner with operations teams to execute creator outreach and onboarding while building long-term, trust-based relationships
- Develop tailored growth and content strategies for priority creators to scale their presence and impact on TikTok
- Identify common creator pain points across product, monetization, and distribution, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive resolution and experience improvements
- Design and execute creator advocacy programs to amplify creators' external influence for TikTok
- Work closely with Marketing and Product teams to align external messaging and translate creator needs into product improvements

Qualifications

Minimum Qualification(s):
- Bachelor’s degree or above, with 3+ years of experience in creator ecosystem, content platforms, or related fields
- Strong understanding of content platform ecosystems
- Strong data sensitivity with the ability to use SQL for analysis and problem-solving
- Proven ability to drive cross-functional collaboration and execution
- Strategic thinking with a deep understanding of creator growth dynamics

Preferred Qualification(s):
- High level of self-motivation and ability to work in a fast-paced environment

Job Information

【For Pay Transparency】Compensation Description (Annually)

The base salary range for this position in the selected city is $93600 - $220400 annually.

​

Compensation may vary outside of this range depending on a number of factors, including a candidate’s qualifications, skills, competencies and experience, and location. Base pay is one part of the Total Package that is provided to compensate and recognize employees for their work, and this role may be eligible for additional discretionary bonuses/incentives, and restricted stock units.

​

Benefits may vary depending on the nature of employment and the country work location. Employees have day one access to medical, dental, and vision insurance, a 401(k) savings plan with company match, paid parental leave, short-term and long-term disability coverage, life insurance, wellbeing benefits, among others. Employees also receive 10 paid holidays per year, 10 paid sick days per year and 17 days of Paid Personal Time (prorated upon hire with increasing accruals by tenure).

​

The Company reserves the right to modify or change these benefits programs at any time, with or without notice.

​

For Los Angeles County (unincorporated) Candidates:

​

Qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with all federal, state, and local laws including the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers and the California Fair Chance Act. Our company believes that criminal history may have a direct, adverse and negative relationship on the following job duties, potentially resulting in the withdrawal of the conditional offer of employment:

​

1. Interacting and occasionally having unsupervised contact with internal/external clients and/or colleagues;

​

2. Appropriately handling and managing confidential information including proprietary and trade secret information and access to information technology systems; and

​

3. Exercising sound judgment.

​

About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.

​

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.

​

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

​

​

Diversity & Inclusion

​

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.
